intents.name: Greeting
intents.response: Thanks for calling. What can I help you with?

intents.name: Verify Identity
intents.response: Sure, what's your phone number so I can pull up your account?

intents.name: Request Help
intents.response: Sure thing, what do you need help with?

intents.name: Business Hours
intents.response: We're here Monday to Friday, 9 to 5. What do you need?

intents.name: Transfer to Agent
intents.response: Let me get someone to help you. Hang on just a sec.
